story: As a shopper, I want to browse the product catalogue, search for products by name, and filter by category, so that I can find items I want to purchase.

cases.title: View all products on homepage
assertions: The product grid should display 18 products

cases.title: Search for a product by name
steps: Enter the search term 'headphones' in the search bar
assertions: Only products matching 'headphones' should be visible
The results count should display '1 product'

cases.title: Search with no results
steps: Enter the search term 'xyznonexistent' in the search bar

cases.title: Filter products by category
assertions: Only products in the 'Tech' category should be visible
The 'Tech' filter chip should be highlighted

cases.title: Reset filters to view all products
assertions: All 18 products should be visible again

cases.title: Combined search and filter
steps: Enter the search term 'headphones' in the search bar
assertions: Only 'Wireless Noise-Cancelling Headphones' should be visible
The results count should display '1 product'
